title: Counter and Rental Clerks
description: Receive orders, generally in person, for repairs, rentals, and services. May describe available options, compute cost, and accept payment.

tasks.text: Compute charges for merchandise or services and receive payments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive orders for services, such as rentals, repairs, dry cleaning, and storage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain rental fees, policies, and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide information about rental items, such as availability, operation, or description.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise customers on use and care of merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Greet customers and discuss the type, quality, and quantity of merchandise sought for rental.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer telephones to provide information and receive orders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect and adjust rental items to meet needs of customer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare rental forms, obtaining customer signature and other information, such as required licenses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rent items, arrange for provision of services to customers, and accept returns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep records of transactions and of the number of customers entering an establishment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive, examine, and tag articles to be altered, cleaned, stored, or repaired.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reserve items for requested times and keep records of items rented.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Prepare merchandise for display or for purchase or rental.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend and provide advice on a wide variety of products and services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Allocate equipment to participants in sporting events or recreational activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
